title: I got confirmed
subtitle: Fragile conviction, unresolved tension; identity claimed in the middle of struggle
description: An artifact documenting a pivot point from endurance to identity. It captures a moment of spiritual ignition where a specific direction—Anglicanism and the Christian life—is claimed and declared despite ongoing internal struggle and future uncertainty.

motifMap.meaning: A small, real ignition of identity that does not yet warm the room.
Moving from resisting something to becoming someone; identity as a deeper binding.

excerpt: I am an Anglican… I have confessed truly that I am to live a christian life… I want to hold and be held… I see no time that is coming soon

associatedMedia.description: Substack post header for I got confirmed
associatedMedia.altText: A screenshot associated with the I got confirmed post.

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis 3.0. Identified as a pivot point in the formation arc: from resisting to becoming. Filename: i-got-confirmed.phase-the-candles-flame--vow-endurance.metadata.v2.6.1.json
